steps.title: Add the five values
steps.content: Sum the masses: $3710,3710,3130,3750,3150$, giving a total of $17450$.

steps.title: Divide by the count
steps.content: The mean is $$\tfrac{17450}{5}=3490.$$ The answer is 3490.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $3490$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $3490$.
